info.name: Mutabiq.AI API Collection
info.description: Comprehensive API collection for Mutabiq.AI platform covering all endpoints including authentication, organizations, projects, AI models, compliance, and more.

item.name: Authentication

request.description:
Authenticate user with email and password. Returns access token.

**Required Fields:**
- `email` (string): Valid email address
- `password` (string): User password

Accept a team invitation and create a new user account.

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Full name
- `password` (string, min 8): User password
- `token` (string): Invitation token received via email

item.description: Endpoints for user authentication and invitation acceptance

item.name: User Profile

request.description:
Get the authenticated user's profile information.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.description: User profile management endpoints

item.name: Billing & Subscriptions

request.description:
Retrieve all active subscription plans.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Subscribe to a specific plan, upgrade, or downgrade current subscription.

**Path Parameters:**

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

**Note:** User must have a payment method added before subscribing.

Cancel the active subscription.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Retrieve all invoices for the authenticated user.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Retrieve the upcoming invoice for the active subscription.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get redirect URL to Stripe billing portal to add a payment method.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.description: Billing, subscription, and payment method management endpoints

item.name: Organizations

request.description:
Get all organizations for the authenticated user with members.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Acme Corporation",
    "website": "https://acme.com",
    "phone": "+1234567890",
    "country": "United States",
    "is_active": true
}

request.description:
Create a new organization.

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Organization name
- `is_active` (boolean): Active status

**Optional Fields:**
- `website` (string, max 255, URL): Organization website (must be unique)
- `phone` (string, max 20): Phone number (must be unique)
- `country` (string, max 500): Country name

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)
**Authorization:** User must have permission to create organizations

item.description: Organization management endpoints

item.name: Team Members

request.description:
Get all members of the user's organization.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Update a team member's details.

**Path Parameters:**
- `user` (integer): User ID

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Member's name
- `role` (string): Member role

**Role Options:**
- `owner`
- `project_lead`
- `reviewer`
- `contributor`
- `auditor`

**Note:** Cannot assign `admin` or `super_admin` roles

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Delete a team member.

**Path Parameters:**
- `user` (integer): User ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Invite new members to the organization.

**Required Fields:**
- `members` (array, min 1): Array of member invitations
- `members.*.email` (string, max 255): Valid email address
- `members.*.role` (string): User role

**Role Options:**
- `super_admin`
- `admin`
- `owner`
- `project_lead`
- `reviewer`
- `contributor`
- `auditor`

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.description: Team member management endpoints

request.description:
Get filtered list of projects for the authenticated user.

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Filter by project name
- `governance_pillar` (string, max 255): Filter by governance pillar
- `per_page` (integer, 1-100): Results per page

Create a new project.

**Required Fields:**

item.name: AI Models

request.description:
Get all AI models for the user's organization.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)
**Note:** User must belong to an organization

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Example AI Model",
    "category": "traditional_ml", // PrimaryCategory: traditional_ml, statistical_classical_model, rule_based_expert_system, hybrid_rules_ml, generative_ai_foundation_llm, generative_ai_fine_tuned_domain_model, generative_ai_multimodal, agentic_ai_agent, autonomous_decision_system, other
    "type": "classification",
    "ownership_category": "internal", // OwnershipType: internal, external, joint, open_source
    "responsible_org_role": "developer", // OrganizationalRole: developer, importer, deployer, integrator, provider
    "technical_domain": "fraud_detection",
    "purpose": "Detect fraudulent transactions",
    "criticality_level": "high",
    "regulatory_risk_tier": "moderate",
    "eu_ai_category": "limited",
    "business_owner_id": 1,
    "custodian_id": 2,
    "business_adoption_status": "planned" // BusinessStatus: planned, active, deprecated, retired
}

request.description:
Create a new AI model.

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): AI model name
- `source_org_stakeholder_id` (integer): Source organization stakeholder ID (must exist)
- `primary_category` (string): Primary category
- `type` (string, max 255): Model type
- `operational_status` (string): Operational status
- `business_status` (string): Business status
- `ownership_type` (string): Ownership type
- `development_source` (string): Development source

**Primary Category Options:**
- `traditional_ml`
- `deep_learning`
- `generative_ai`
- `ai_agents`
- `specialized_ai`
- `foundation_models`
- `multimodal_ai`

**Operational Status Options:**
- `not_deployed`
- `development`
- `testing`
- `production`

**Business Status Options:**
- `planned`
- `active`
- `deprecated`
- `retired`

**Ownership Type Options:**
- `internal`
- `external`
- `joint`
- `licensed`
- `open_source`
- `saas`

**Development Source Options:**
- `internal_development`
- `external_vendor`
- `open_source_community`
- `cloud_provider`
- `partnership`

**Optional Fields:**
- `description` (string): Model description
- `owner_stakeholder_id` (integer): Owner stakeholder ID
- `vendor_id` (integer): Vendor ID
- `domain_specialization` (string, max 255): Domain specialization
- `regulatory_risk_classification` (string, max 255): Risk classification

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)
**Note:** User must belong to an organization

Get details of a specific AI model.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModel` (integer): AI Model ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.name: AI Model Versions

query.description: Filter by version type (major, minor, patch, experimental)

request.description:
Get all AI model versions for the user's organization with optional filtering.

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `ai_model_id` (integer): Filter by AI Model ID
- `version_type` (string): Filter by version type
- `deployment_status` (string): Filter by deployment status
- `per_page` (integer): Results per page

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

body.raw:
{
  "version_number": "2.1.0", // string, max 255
  "version_type": "minor", // enum: major, minor, patch, experimental
  "ai_model_id": 1, // integer, must exist in ai_models table
  "description": "Enhanced sentiment analysis with improved accuracy", // string, max 1000
  "org_involvement": "full_development", // enum: full_development, fine_tuning, configuration_only, integration_only
  "release_date": "2025-12-01", // date, YYYY-MM-DD
  "release_notes": "Improved accuracy by 15%, added support for multilingual sentiment analysis", // string
  "release_role": "original_release", // enum: original_release, patch, hotfix, experimental_ab_test
  "source_type": "internal_development", // enum: internal_development, vendor_model, open_source, foundation_model
  "architecture_type": "transformer", // enum: transformer, cnn, rnn_lstm_gru, gradient_boosting, random_forest, logistic_regression, linear_regression, other
  "model_file_size_gb": 2.5, // number, min 0
  "training_duration_hours": 48, // integer, min 0
  "complexity_level": "moderate", // enum: low, moderate, high, very_high
  "parameter_count": 350000000, // integer, min 0
  "input_modalities": ["text", "image"], // array, options: text, image, audio, video, structured_data, time_series
  "output_modalities": ["text", "classification"], // array, options: text, image, audio, classification, regression, embedding, structured_data
  "deployment_status": "production", // enum: not_deployed, testing, staging, production, retired
  "lifecycle_stage": "deployment", // enum: development, design, validation, deployment, monitoring, retired
  "deployment_environments": ["production", "staging"], // array, options: development, testing, staging, production
  "customizations_applied": ["language support", "performance tuning"], // array of strings
  "approval_status": "approved_for_production" // enum: pending_review, approved_for_pilot, approved_for_production, rejected, rolled_back
}

request.description:
Create a new AI model version.

**Required Fields:**
- `version_number` (string, max 255): Version number (e.g., "2.1.0")
- `version_type` (string): Type of version
- `ai_model_id` (integer): AI Model ID (must exist)
- `architecture_type` (string, max 255): Architecture description
- `model_file_size_gb` (number, min 0): Model size in GB
- `complexity_level` (string): Complexity level
- `deployment_status` (string): Current deployment status
- `lifecycle_stage` (string): Current lifecycle stage

**Version Type Options:**
- `major`
- `minor`
- `patch`
- `experimental`

**Complexity Level Options:**
- `simple`
- `moderate`
- `complex`
- `massive`

**Deployment Status Options:**
- `not_deployed`
- `deploying`
- `deployed`
- `failed`
- `rollback`

**Lifecycle Stage Options:**
- `development`
- `testing`
- `staging`
- `production`
- `deprecated`
- `retired`

**Input Modalities Options:**
- `text`
- `image`
- `audio`
- `video`
- `structured_data`
- `time_series`

**Output Modalities Options:**
- `text`
- `image`
- `audio`
- `classification`
- `regression`
- `embedding`
- `structured_data`

**Optional Fields:**
- `description` (string, max 1000): Version description
- `version_role` (string, max 255): Role of this version
- `version_source` (string, max 255): Source of version
- `our_involvement` (string, max 255): Organization's involvement
- `release_date` (date): Release date
- `release_notes` (string): Detailed release notes
- `training_duration_hours` (integer, min 0): Training duration
- `parameter_count` (integer, min 0): Number of parameters
- `input_modalities` (array): Input modality types
- `output_modalities` (array): Output modality types
- `deployment_environments` (array): Deployment environment names
- `has_performance_data` (boolean): Whether performance data exists

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get details of a specific AI model version.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelVersion` (integer): AI Model Version ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Update an existing AI model version.

**Path Parameters:**

**All fields are optional (use 'sometimes' validation):**

- `description` (string, max 1000)
- `version_role` (string, max 255)
- `version_source` (string, max 255)

- `release_notes` (string)
- `architecture_type` (string, max 255)
- `model_file_size_gb` (number, min 0)
- `training_duration_hours` (integer, min 0)
- `complexity_level` (string): [simple, moderate, complex, massive]
- `parameter_count` (integer, min 0)
- `input_modalities` (array): [text, image, audio, video, structured_data, time_series]
- `output_modalities` (array): [text, image, audio, classification, regression, embedding, structured_data]
- `deployment_status` (string): [not_deployed, deploying, deployed, failed, rollback]
- `lifecycle_stage` (string): [development, testing, staging, production, deprecated, retired]
- `deployment_environments` (array)
- `has_performance_data` (boolean)

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.name: AI Model Cards

request.description:
Get paginated list of AI model cards for the user's organization.

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `per_page` (integer): Results per page (default: 15)

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

body.raw:
{
    "version_id": 1,
    "title": "Customer Sentiment Analysis Model Card v2.1",
    "creator_role": "internal_team", // [internal_team, vendor_provided, community_contributed, auto_generated]
    "owner_stakeholder_id": 1,
    "format": "standard", // [standard, regulatory, industry_specific, custom]
    "model_overview": "This model analyzes customer feedback to determine sentiment (positive, negative, neutral). It uses a transformer-based architecture trained on 2M customer reviews.",
    "intended_use": "Designed for analyzing customer feedback in e-commerce platforms. Should be used for sentiment classification only, not for generating responses.",
    "training_data_overview": "Trained on 2 million customer reviews from diverse e-commerce platforms, covering 10 product categories. Data collected between 2020-2024.",
    "bias_evaluation_methods": "Tested across demographic groups, geographic regions, and product categories. Bias metrics calculated using disparate impact analysis.",
    "model_limitations": "May underperform on sarcastic or highly contextual language. Limited to English language only. Not suitable for nuanced emotion detection.",
    "ethical_considerations": "Ensure diverse representation in training data. Monitor for bias in production. Do not use for individual profiling or discriminatory decisions.",
    "organizational_context": {"department": "Customer Experience", "compliance_framework": "ISO 27001"},
    "performance_summary": "Accuracy: 94.2%, Precision: 93.8%, Recall: 94.5%, F1-Score: 94.1%. Tested on 500K reviews.",
    "risk_summary": "Low risk classification. Primary risks include bias in underrepresented categories and privacy concerns with training data.",
    "status": "approved", // [draft, in_review, approved, published, archived]
    "publication_status": "published_internal", // [not_published, published_internal, published_public]
    "publication_date": "2025-11-04",
    "last_review_date": "2025-11-01",
    "next_review_date": "2026-05-01"
}

request.description:
Create a new AI model card for documenting model details, ethics, and compliance.

**Required Fields:**
- `version_id` (integer): AI Model Version ID (must exist)
- `title` (string, min 10, max 255): Card title
- `creator_role` (string): Role of card creator
- `owner_stakeholder_id` (integer): Owner stakeholder ID (must exist)
- `format` (string): Card format type
- `model_overview` (string): Overview of the model
- `intended_use` (string): Intended use cases
- `training_data_overview` (string): Training data description
- `bias_evaluation_methods` (string): How bias was evaluated
- `model_limitations` (string): Known limitations
- `ethical_considerations` (string): Ethical considerations
- `performance_summary` (string): Performance metrics summary
- `risk_summary` (string): Risk assessment summary
- `status` (string): Current status
- `publication_status` (string): Publication status

**Creator Role Options:**
- `internal_team`
- `vendor_provided`
- `community_contributed`
- `auto_generated`

**Format Options:**
- `standard`
- `regulatory`
- `industry_specific`
- `custom`

**Status Options:**
- `draft`
- `in_review`
- `approved`
- `published`
- `archived`

**Publication Status Options:**
- `not_published`
- `published_internal`
- `published_public`

**Optional Fields:**
- `organizational_context` (object/JSON): Additional context
- `publication_date` (date): When published
- `last_review_date` (date): Last review date
- `next_review_date` (date): Next scheduled review

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get details of a specific AI model card.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelCard` (integer): AI Model Card ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

request.description:
Create a new Record of Processing Activity (ROPA) entry for GDPR/privacy compliance.

**Required Fields:**
- `activity_code` (string, max 255, unique): Unique activity identifier
- `activity_name` (string, max 255): Name of the processing activity
- `purpose` (string): Purpose of data processing
- `owner_team` (enum): Team responsible - hr, finance, risk, ai/ml, it, marketing, operations, legal, sales
- `controller_role` (enum): Role in processing - controller, processor, joint_controller
- `data_subject_categories` (array, min 1): Categories of data subjects - customers, employees, prospects, vendors, students, children, patients
- `data_categories` (array, min 1): Types of data processed - name, contact, identifier, financial, health, biometric, behavioral, sensitive, children, location
- `contains_pii` (boolean): Whether processing contains PII
- `consent_required` (boolean): Whether explicit consent is required
- `lawful_basis` (enum): Legal basis - consent, contract, legitimate_interest, legal_obligation, public_task, vital_interest
- `consent_coverage_percent` (integer, 0-100): Percentage of subjects with consent
- `dpia_required` (boolean): Whether DPIA (Data Protection Impact Assessment) is required
- `dpia_status` (enum): DPIA status - required, in_progress, completed, approved, rejected
- `retention_period` (string, max 255): How long data is retained (e.g., '2 years')
- `retention_justification` (string): Why this retention period is necessary
- `has_international_transfers` (boolean): Whether data is transferred internationally
- `applicable_jurisdictions` (array, min 1): Applicable jurisdictions - eu, uae, uk, ksa, difc, us_ca, other
- `security_measures` (string): Description of security measures
- `internal_recipients` (array): Internal teams/departments receiving data
- `external_recipients` (array): External organizations receiving data
- `status` (enum): Current status - draft, active, under_review, archived

**Optional Fields:**
- `detailed_purpose` (string): Detailed explanation of the purpose
- `legitimate_interest_assessment` (string): Assessment of legitimate interest
- `dpia_id` (string, UUID): ID of the DPIA document
- `last_reviewed_date` (date): Last review date
- `next_review_date` (date): Scheduled next review date

**Owner Team Enum Values:**
- `hr` - Human Resources
- `finance` - Finance Department
- `risk` - Risk Management
- `ai/ml` - AI/Machine Learning
- `it` - Information Technology
- `marketing` - Marketing
- `operations` - Operations
- `legal` - Legal Department
- `sales` - Sales Department

**Controller Role Enum Values:**
- `controller` - Data Controller
- `processor` - Data Processor
- `joint_controller` - Joint Data Controller

**Data Subject Category Enum Values:**
- `customers` - Customers
- `employees` - Employees
- `prospects` - Prospects/Leads
- `vendors` - Vendors/Suppliers
- `students` - Students
- `children` - Children
- `patients` - Patients

**Data Category Enum Values:**
- `name` - Names
- `contact` - Contact Information (email, phone)
- `identifier` - Identifiers (ID numbers, social security)
- `financial` - Financial Data (payment methods, transactions)
- `health` - Health Information
- `biometric` - Biometric Data (fingerprints, facial recognition)
- `behavioral` - Behavioral Data (browsing history, preferences)
- `sensitive` - Sensitive Personal Data
- `children` - Children's Data
- `location` - Location Data

**Lawful Basis Enum Values:**
- `consent` - Explicit consent from data subject
- `contract` - Processing necessary for contract performance
- `legitimate_interest` - Legitimate interests of the controller
- `legal_obligation` - Legal or regulatory obligation
- `public_task` - Public task or official authority
